config.title: Backtest Configuration
config.instrumentHelp: Select a currency pair to backtest
config.initialBalanceHelp: Starting account balance for the backtest
config.slippageHelp: Expected slippage per trade in pips

validation.dateRangeInvalid: Start date must be before end date
validation.initialBalanceInvalid: Initial balance must be greater than 0

progress.title: Backtest Progress
progress.noBacktest: No backtest running. Configure and start a backtest to see progress.
progress.completed: Backtest completed successfully! View results below.
progress.failed: Backtest failed to complete. Please try again.

results.title: Backtest Results
results.noResults: No results available. Run a backtest to see results.

history.title: Backtest History
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backtest?
history.noBacktests: No backtest history available. Run a backtest to see it here.

tradeLog.title: Trade Log
tradeLog.noTrades: No trades available. Run a backtest to see trade history.

comparison.title: Compare Backtests
comparison.instructions: Select up to 4 backtests to compare. Only completed backtests can be compared.
comparison.maxSelectionError: You can only compare up to 4 backtests at a time
comparison.statisticalNote: Comparing the first two selected backtests using a two-sample t-test
comparison.significanceExplanation: A statistically significant result (p < 0.05) suggests that the difference in performance between the two strategies is unlikely to be due to chance alone.
comparison.noSelection: Select backtests above to compare their performance

empty.createFirstTask: Create your first backtest task to get started

detail.viewingHistoricalExecution: You are viewing a past execution. The data shown below is from this historical run.

form.chooseStrategyConfig: Choose a strategy configuration for this backtest task
form.configureParameters: Configure the backtest time range, instrument, and initial settings
form.updateParameters: Update the backtest time range, instrument, and initial settings
form.reviewBeforeSubmitting: Review your backtest task configuration before submitting
form.configurationNotFound: Configuration not found. Please go back and select a valid configuration.
form.pipSizeHelperText: Leave empty to auto-fetch from OANDA account
form.pipSizeHelperTextLong: Leave empty to auto-derive from instrument. Common values: 0.0001 (EUR_USD), 0.01 (USD_JPY)
form.restartRequiredForExecutionEdits: Execution setting changes apply to the next restart. Name and description changes apply immediately.
form.replaySettingsRestartNotice: Changing replay granularity or window value mode disables continuation of the current run. After saving, never-started tasks can only be started, and tasks with execution history can only be restarted.
form.closePositionsAtCompletion: Close all positions at backtest completion
form.closePositionsDescription: When enabled, all open positions will be automatically closed at the final market price when the backtest finishes.
form.hedgingDescription: Allow simultaneous long and short positions during backtest.
form.dateRangeHelperText: Backtesting requires historical data. Future dates are not allowed.
form.reviewErrorsCorrectionHint: Click Back to return to previous steps and correct these errors.
form.noTickDataFound: No tick data found for {{instrument}} in the database.
form.tickDataRangeFetchFailed: Failed to fetch tick data range.
form.startTimeBeforeMinData: Start time is before the earliest data timestamp ({{timestamp}}).
form.endTimeAfterMaxData: End time is after the latest data timestamp ({{timestamp}}).
form.advancedSettingsDescription: Drain-on-stop and market-close idling behaviour. Market-idle thresholds are evaluated against the replayed tick timestamps, not wall-clock time.
form.drainDurationHoursHelp: Maximum hours to keep draining before giving up. 0 = wait forever for breakeven.
form.marketIdlePreCloseMinutesHelp: Switch to IDLE this many minutes before the weekly forex close. Evaluated against the replayed tick timestamp. 0 disables.
form.marketIdleResumeDelayMinutesHelp: Wait this many minutes (replayed clock) after the market reopens before resuming trading.
form.maxTickGapHoursHelp: Fail the backtest if replayed ticks jump forward by more than this many hours. Default: 120 (5 days).
form.marketCloseEnabledDescription: When disabled, the backtest never treats any replayed time as market-closed and the idle thresholds above have no effect.
form.marketCloseHourUtcHelp: Hour of day at which the market closes (0–23 UTC).
form.marketOpenHourUtcHelp: Hour of day at which the market reopens (0–23 UTC).

toast.cannotDeleteRunning: Cannot delete running task. Stop it first.

stopDialog.title: Stop Backtest Task
stopDialog.message: Are you sure you want to stop "{{taskName}}"?

floorLog.title: Strategy Execution Log
floorLog.noEvents: No strategy events available for this backtest.
floorLog.description: Detailed execution log showing initial positions, layer additions, retracements, and take profits.
